name: GH_DocumentContext
summary: Enumerates all possible (de)activation contexts for documents.

enum_values.name: Unknown
enum_values.summary: Specifies unknown context. This should never be used.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Specifies unset state. This is only used for documents that have never been in a context.

enum_values.name: Open
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document was created anew from a file.

enum_values.name: Close
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document has been unloaded from memory.

enum_values.name: Loaded
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document has been loaded into the Canvas.

enum_values.name: Unloaded
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document has been unloaded from the Canvas.

enum_values.name: Lock
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document has been locked. This is only possible for nested documents.

enum_values.name: Unlock
enum_values.summary: Indicates the document has been unlocked. This is only possible for nested documents.
